meta.title: mamad_dev | Professional Web Design
meta.description: Professional web design and development with excellent quality and fair price

hero.subtitle: Professional web design and development — from idea to launch. Quality code, beautiful design, and unlimited support.

about.label: About Me
about.heading: Professional Web
about.desc1: I'm mamad_dev — a designer and developer passionate about creating beautiful and functional experiences. I believe every project has a unique story and I'm here to tell it in the best way possible. My commitment to quality and unlimited support is what sets me apart.
about.desc2: From responsive websites to full-stack applications, I deliver solutions that combine eye-catching aesthetics with clean, maintainable code. Every project receives my full attention and commitment to excellence.

process.label: My Process
process.heading: Work
process.step1Desc: We explore your goals, requirements, and vision for the project to align from the start.
process.step2Desc: I provide a comprehensive proposal with clear timeline, deliverables, and transparent pricing.
process.step3Desc: I build your project with regular updates and incorporate your feedback throughout.
process.step4Desc: Your project goes live with full documentation and ongoing free support.

testimonials.label: Client Reviews
testimonials.heading: What Clients
testimonials.card1Quote: "mamad_dev's delivery and quality exceeded our expectations. The website was delivered on time and looks absolutely stunning. Post-delivery support was also excellent."
testimonials.card1Alt: Ali Ahmadi - Brand Manager at Deniz
testimonials.card2Quote: "Professional, responsive, and incredibly talented. The online store they built dramatically increased our sales."
testimonials.card3Quote: "Amazing work! The attention to detail and commitment to quality is commendable. I highly recommend them for any web project."

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: Frequently Asked
faq.a1: Project cost depends on complexity. After the discovery session, I provide a detailed and transparent estimate. As a special offer, get 20% off on your first project.
faq.q2: How long does it take to deliver?
faq.a2: Typical projects take 2 to 6 weeks depending on scope and complexity. My proposal includes a detailed timeline so you know exactly what to expect.
faq.a3: I have over 4 years of coding experience, 8 successful projects, and a 100% client satisfaction rate. Plus, I offer a money-back guarantee — if you're not satisfied, I'll refund 100% of your payment.
faq.q4: Is the code clean and SEO-optimized?
faq.a4: Absolutely! I write clean, semantic, and well-documented code. All websites are optimized for search engines with proper meta tags, semantic HTML, and fast loading times.

timeline.label: My Learning Path
timeline.heading: Technology
timeline.item1Desc: Started with semantic HTML and responsive CSS layouts.
timeline.item2Desc: Learned vanilla JavaScript, DOM manipulation, and ES6+ features.
timeline.item3Desc: Built modern SPA and SSR applications with the React ecosystem.
timeline.item4Desc: Full-stack development with APIs, databases, and server-side logic.
